ddls:
CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "full_title" TEXT /* Full title of the journal */,
  "abbreviated_title" TEXT /* Abbreviated title of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN number of the journal */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the journal */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the journal metrics */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the journal */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the journal is published */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the journal is published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journals_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journals_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journals_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal */,
  "journal_impact_factor" REAL /* Journal Impact Factor */,
  "five_year_impact_factor" REAL /* 5-Year Impact Factor */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the metric */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the journal */,
  "article_count" INTEGER /* Number of articles published in the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_metrics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_metrics_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year of the journal metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, publisher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution with which the user is affiliated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the journal */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the journal was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_history_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_history_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was performed */,
  "results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the search */,
  "search_filters" TEXT /* Filters applied to the search (e.g., category, year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., impact factor analysis, category comparison) */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the publisher is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)
